title: Bath Oil & Bath Bomb Gift Set Mandarin & Ginger Honey Neroli Scent Elysium Spa
features: Elysium Bath oil & Bath bomb gift set # Mandarin & Ginger.

This Mandarin and Ginger bath oil and bath bombs gift set is a delightful and soothing gift idea. This set can be a perfect way to pamper someone or to provide them with a relaxing and aromatic bathing experience. Mandarin and Ginger are a lovely, invigorating scent combination.

The gift set includes a bottle of Mandarin & Ginger bath oil 100ml which is specially formulated with nourishing and moisturising ingredients. Bath oil is designed to hydrate and soften the skin while adding a delightful fragrance to the bathwater. A sweet scent with notes of ginger, mandarin and rhubarb.

In addition to the bath oil, the set contains four bath bombs. Bath bombs are compact, solid spheres that effervesce and dissolve in the bathwater, releasing their aromatic and soothing properties. Included are two 50g Neroli & sweet orange bath bombs. A tangy citrus scent with notes of lemon, orange and lavender, and two 50g Chamomile & honey bath bombs. A calming scent with notes of apple, honey & vanilla.

The combination of bath oil and bath bombs makes for a pampering and soothing bath experience, perfect for unwinding and relaxing after a long day. This gift set offers a complete bath experience, allowing the recipient to transform their bathtub into a spa-like retreat in the comfort of their own home.

A calming scent with notes of apple, honey & vanilla. The combination of bath oil and bath bombs makes for a pampering and soothing bath experience, perfect for unwinding and relaxing after a long day. This gift set offers a complete bath experience, allowing the recipient to transform their bathtub into a spa-like retreat in the comfort of their own home. Directions 1. Fill the bathtub with warm water. 2. Pour the bath oil into the running water. 3. Drop the bath bombs into the tub one at a time, allowing them to dissolve and release their scents and properties. 4. Enter the tub and enjoy the soothing and aromatic experience. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Do not ingest. Use in a well-ventilated area. See more
